content: To proceed with the SteelSight — Estimation Pro analysis, please provide the following required inputs:

Project Files: Upload all relevant structural drawings (framing plans, elevations, sections, details), specifications, and any available Bill of Materials (BOM). Per-Ton Rate Band: Specify your shop's commercial per-ton fabrication rates:
Once these inputs are provided, I will execute the full tonnage take-off and cost estimation as per the requested mode.
